mano_cua.result_summary: autoLink功能正常将URL转为超链接(<a>标签+data-auto-link属性)，但editableInput事件未在autoLink转换后触发：事件仅在输入URL文本和按空格时触发(innerHTML仍为纯文本)，autoLink DOM转换完成后未再触发editableInput事件
mano_cua.last_reasoning: Console shows: editableInput fired 3 times (initial, URL typed, space added) but none after autoLink conversion. innerHTML confirms URL was converted to <a href> with data-auto-link span, but editableInput event did NOT fire for the autoLink conversion step. This means the editor does not properly notify event listeners when autoLink modifies the DOM.
